name: Select Active
description: Selects active cells/traces based on activity criteria.
author: Daniel Zanelli

parameters.name: input_csv
parameters.label: Input CSV
parameters.description: CSV file with the fluorescence traces

parameters.name: threshold_std
parameters.label: Threshold (standard deviations)
parameters.description: Number of standard deviations above the mean to consider a cell active

parameters.name: min_duration
parameters.label: Minimum duration (frames)
parameters.description: Minimum number of consecutive frames above the threshold to count as an event

outputs.active_csv: Path to the CSV with the traces of active cells only
